applicability_notes: Unary elementwise activation: tanhshrink(x) = x - tanh(x). Can also fuse the explicit decomposed chain [torch.tanh(x), torch.sub(x, tanh_x)] into a single ttnn.tanhshrink call. bfloat8_b inputs are round-tripped through ttnn.to_torch in tests before computing golden to account for block-float quantization.; torch_pattern_source: golden; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.tanhshrink(input_tensor)
